THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONSUMER PORTFOLIO SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMES, DARREN L $10,407.61 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,327.80 INTEREST, $483.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,968.41, PLAINTIFF IS ALSO AWARDED POSSESSION OF THE 2004 BMW 6 SERIES WITH VIN ENDING IN 9989. UPON GAINING POSSESSION PLAINTIFF IS ORDERD TO SELL SAME IN A COMMERCIALLY REASONABLE MANNER APPLYING THE NET SALES PROCEEDS TO THE JUDGMENT AS ENTERED ABOVE.SEE SCANNED DOC
